drl:
rule "R0"
salience -5
when
    ( $p0_0 : T0() )
    or
    ( $p0_0 : T0() )
then
    drools.setFocus("gb");
    insertLogical(new T1(-4, $p0_0.getF0(), $p0_0.getF0()));
end
rule "R1"
salience -5
when
    ( $p1_0 : T0($b1_0_0 : f0) )
    or
    ( $p1_0 : T0($b1_0_0 : f0) )
    or
    ( $p1_0 : T0($b1_0_0 : f0) )
then
    insertLogical(new T1(-2, $p1_0.getF0(), $b1_0_0));
end
rule "R2"
salience 1
when
    $p2_0 : T0(f0 not in (-1.0, 4.5), f0 == -1000000007, $b2_0_0 : f0, $b2_0_1 : f0)
then
    drools.setFocus("gb");
    insertLogical(new T1(8, $p2_0.getF0(), $b2_0_1));
    insertLogical(new T1($b2_0_0, 10, $b2_0_0));
end
rule "R3"
agenda-group "gb"
when
    accumulate( T0(f0 <= 2, f0 != -1000000007); $a3_0 : count() )
    T0(f0 == $a3_0, $b3_1_0 : f0, $b3_1_1 : f0)
then
end
rule "R4"
salience 6
when
    T1($b4_0_0 : f2, $b4_0_1 : f2)

end
